I2C Specification v1.0

1. Overview
The I2C module implements 2-wire serial bus interface.

2. Interface Signals
- clk: 1-bit input clock
- rst_n: 1-bit active-low reset
- scl: 1-bit inout serial clock
- sda: 1-bit inout serial data

3. FSM States
The I2C controller uses a 6-state FSM: IDLE, START, ADDR, DATA, ACK, STOP

4. Register Map
- 0x00: i2c_addr (7-bit) - RW - Reset: 0x00 - Slave address
- 0x04: i2c_ctrl (8-bit) - RW - Reset: 0x00 - Control command
- 0x08: i2c_status (8-bit) - RO - Reset: 0x00 - Status flags
